patterns_recognized: D-grade picks with simultaneous SP-edge-against AND PQI-against have failed directionally ~78% (7-of-9) through 5/21; treat as expected-wrong direction, not neutral skip.
C-grade GOLD CONFIRM with F3-alone (no corroborating SP or PQI) lost again 5/21 (WSH 2-1); never CONFIRM GOLD on F3-alone without SP quality edge or PQI >= +5.
HARD CAP 1 (negative edge) is EV-protective and directionally neutral; do not rescue HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket picks when fair_prob diverges >15pp from model.
HARD CAP 7 near-zero bullpen gaps (+0.001-0.003) have been direction-correct in live sample (5/20 MIN); maintain threshold but note near-zero gaps provide minimal incremental certainty.
BvP OWNER-level batters (shrunk OPS >= 0.85, PA >= 17) are directionally predictive; two or more WEAK_VS in a team's top-4 is a reliable soft bearish signal for that side.

PIT @ TOR.reasoning: HARD CAP 4 (Stage 1/2 delta=0.234 + confidence_downgrade) and HARD CAP 10 (bottom-bucket) both correctly fire. The market gives TOR only 32.37% to win the full game (fair_prob=0.324) vs the model's 50.22% — a 17.85pp divergence strongly indicating the market sees TOR's bullpen fragility the model misses. TOR's bullpen is weaker than PIT (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0144) and bullpen_fatigue is flagged. Despite Dylan Cease's strong F5 edge, the bullpen-carry full-game thesis is unsupported. Do not rescue from HARD CAP 10.
lessons_applied: market-vs-model fair_prob divergence >17pp
HARD CAP 4 Stage1/2 disagree + confidence_downgrade
TOR bullpen weaker on large Stage 1/2 delta with bullpen_fatigue

DET @ BAL.reasoning: HARD CAP 6 correctly fires on edge=+47.53pp — a clear calibrator hallucination (third calibrated instance at this magnitude). BAL direction is plausible given home advantage and lineup quality (Henderson, Alonso, Rutschman), but staking at the model's hallucinated odds is not warranted. Fair_prob=0.205 means the market prices BAL at only 20.5%, implying DET is the market favorite — a massive divergence signaling model-level miscalibration, not genuine edge.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 6 calibrator hallucination > +25pp
fair_prob floor enforcement (0.205 far below 0.42)

MIN @ BOS.reasoning: HARD CAP 5 correctly fires: F1_xera_gap=1.10* is thin-sample only, with no F2, F3, or PQI corroboration. Bottom-bucket pick_prob=53.1% in (0.50,0.55]. Per the 5/21 postgame lesson, C-grade GOLD without SP quality support or PQI >= +5 should not be CONFIRMED. Bailey Ober's thin Statcast sample makes the xERA edge unreliable. Rescuing from HARD CAP 10 via CONFIRM would produce a B-grade pick on a single thin-sample signal — insufficient evidence.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 5 F1-star without PQI/F2/F3 support
C-grade GOLD no-confirm rule from 5/21 postgame
bottom-bucket single-thin-signal caution

CLE @ PHI.reasoning: D-grade dual-signal-against PHI: SP edge 1.42 xERA AGAINST pick (Parker Messick outrates Andrew Painter) and PQI delta=-21.3 AGAINST PHI. This matches the dual-signal pattern with 78% directional failure rate in archive. Team quality also against PHI (-1). All three primary signals oppose the model's direction. SKIP correctly prevents stake. No qualitative overrides: PHI lineup is strong but so is CLE's (Ramirez, Bazzana).
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against expected-wrong pattern
SP-edge-against + PQI-against combination (1.42 xERA, delta=-21.3)

TB @ NYY.reasoning: D-grade dual-signal-against NYY: SP edge 0.73 xERA AGAINST pick (Rasmussen better than Weathers) and PQI delta=-12.4 AGAINST NYY. BvP strongly reinforces the bearish view: Aaron Judge is WEAK_VS vs Rasmussen (15 PA, shrunk OPS 0.572) and Cody Bellinger is WEAK_VS (11 PA, shrunk 0.654) — two WEAK_VS in NYY's top-4, the clearest BvP bearish signal on today's slate. Team quality against NYY (-1). Directional failure likely.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against expected-wrong pattern
BvP two WEAK_VS in top-4 (Judge + Bellinger) vs Rasmussen
SP-edge-against + PQI-against stack

STL @ CIN.reasoning: Brycen Mautz (CIN home SP) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date. PENDING_SP_DATA hard-stop protocol applies — no directional call is possible without a Statcast-graded SP for CIN. Per validated protocol (7+ instances in 2026 archive), this is a hard stop regardless of STL lineup signals. Do not infer pick from lineup quality alone.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA hard-stop protocol
zero-Statcast-pitch SP = unquantifiable quality

NYM @ MIA.reasoning: HARD CAP 7 correctly fires: MIA's bullpen is worse (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0016) on a pre-cap elevated pick (score 3→1). HARD CAP 10 then fires (pick_prob=54.6% without CONFIRM). Edge=+2.5pp is below the 4pp floor. Christian Scott is a small-sample home SP (min_pa=90). Confidence_downgrade=True adds caution. The combination of bullpen disadvantage, edge below floor, and thin SP data justifies SKIP. No rescue from HARD CAP 10.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 bullpen disadvantage on elevated pick
edge below 4pp floor enforcement
small-sample SP + confidence_downgrade stack

SEA @ KC.reasoning: D-grade dual-signal-against KC: SP edge 1.77 xERA AGAINST pick (Bryan Woo significantly outrates Seth Lugo) and PQI delta=-36.6 AGAINST KC — the largest PQI headwind on today's slate. KC's fair_prob=0.4575 is below the 0.42 floor. SEA's top-3 batters show positive BvP vs Lugo (Crawford MEANINGFUL 0.74, Naylor small-sample 0.785). Every primary signal argues KC is the wrong direction. Strong CONFIRM of SKIP.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against with large-magnitude signals (1.77 xERA, PQI -36.6)
largest PQI headwind on slate (-36.6)
fair_prob floor enforcement

LAD @ MIL.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fires (edge=-9.02pp). No rescue warranted.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge EV protection
market information superiority via 9pp fair_prob gap

HOU @ CHC.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fires (edge=-9.17pp; market fair_prob=0.6402 vs model 54.84% — 9.2pp gap). F3_swing_take_gap=516.3 is the sole F-signal, with no F2 or F1. COL @ ARI.reasoning: F3 is the sole F-signal; PQI runs AGAINST ARI (-4.7); confidence_downgrade=True; bullpen_fatigue flagged. Most critically, ARI's pick depends on a bullpen-carry finish (f5_full_delta=0.197 — ARI loses F5 at 49%) yet ARI's bullpen is slightly worse than COL's (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0046). ARI won 2-1 in 5/21 walk-off vs COL, but today's combination of F3-alone + PQI against + bullpen carry on worse pen + confidence_downgrade warrants DOWNGRADE. Edge=1.01pp below floor regardless.
lessons_applied: F3-alone insufficient without PQI or SP support for GOLD CONFIRM
Stage 1/2 disagree (0.197) with worse bullpen on pick side
confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue stack

WSH @ ATL.reasoning: Classic F3-alone-with-opposing-signals pattern (validated 5/18 WSH@NYM 16-7 blowout): F3_swing_take_gap=1181.1 is the sole F-signal while SP edge 0.56 xERA AGAINST WSH (Griffin better than Perez) and PQI delta=+12.2 AGAINST WSH both oppose. Market gives WSH only 37.27% (fair_prob=0.373 below floor). WSH away lineup data is entirely missing (away_top_5 empty). Bullpen_fatigue + hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0217 (WSH worse pen). Mandatory DOWNGRADE per validated pattern.
lessons_applied: F3-alone insufficient when SP-edge and PQI both oppose (5/18 and 5/21 validated)
fair_prob=0.373 < 0.42 floor + market prices WSH at 37%

TEX @ LAA.reasoning: Pre-cap grade A (score=5) with aligned signals: SP edge agrees (+0.74 xERA, Reid Detmers over MacKenzie Gore), PQI confirms (+8.0), Stage 1/2 agree tightly (delta=0.02). HARD CAP 7 fires on hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0030 (near-zero positive gap) — cap correctly demotes to B-. Concerns: F1* thin sample, confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue. Despite these flags, SP and PQI both independently confirm pick direction with 9.52pp edge within [4,15]pp band. Near-zero bullpen gap (+0.003) is not a decisive bearish signal; CONFIRM the demoted pick.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 near-zero bullpen gap accepted at protocol threshold
pre-cap A grade with SP + PQI both confirming preserves directional CONFIRM
confidence_downgrade + F1-star do not flip when SP independently agrees
